blocks.text: When the task DB source claims a task, it writes the following values into bridge.TaskRequest.Metadata.

rows: capability fingerprint used by the C5 selector

blocks.text: The supervisor extracts these values into a typed report context and passes them through StartTask, ReportEvent, and CompleteTask.
The task DB reporter compares runtime_lease_id, runtime_fencing_token, and runtime_capability_fingerprint with the current active sidecar lease. Missing or mismatched values reject progress mutation.
